title: Teaching Guidance Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in teaching guidance Markdown files.

id.description: Unique identifier for the teaching guide, e.g., SJ5-01-teaching

title.description: Display title for the teaching guidance

overview.description: High-level summary of the topic's pedagogical goals

chatbot_delivery_rules.description: Specific constraints and style guides for the AI tutor

rule.description: Short name of the rule (e.g., Pacing, Tone)

dskp_mapping.description: Mapping of textbook topics to official learning standards (SP)

standards.description: List of SP IDs, e.g., 12.1.1, K12.1.5

performance_standards_guidance.description: Guidance on how to assess or deliver content for different TP levels
